name: World Of Wireless International Telecom, Inc.
summary: WiFi Wireless, Inc., a development stage company, engages in the research, development, and commercialization of technologies for use in the military, maritime, and commercial markets in the United States and internationally. It utilizes global positioning satellites for tracking products used in the shipping and transportation industries, as well as applications using UHF frequencies enabling Wi-Fi hardware to provide a range of service, including Point of Presence and Wi-Fi retail space application. The company was formerly known as Sunburst Resources Inc. and changed its name to WiFi Wireless, Inc. in June 2004. WiFi Wireless, Inc. was founded in 1989 and is based in Dana Point, California.
